stainProtocols.name: UC Davis H&E
stainProtocols.description: Derived from UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown); We current utilize our hospital based Histology laboratory- services and rates are located here: https://health.ucdavis.edu/pathology/research/research_labs/histology/index.html. Standard histology.

Survey: 4G8 Covance Cat # SIG-39200

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Posterior hippocampus
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Anterior cingulate
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Amygdala
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Midbrain
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Pons
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Medulla
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Frontal gyrus
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Temporal lobe
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Parietal gyrus
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Visual cortex (occipital)
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Line of Gennari (BA17), BA18.

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Striatum (basal ganglia)
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Anterior Commissure, Nucleus Basalis of Meynert, Globus Pallidus, Caudate, Internal Capsule, External Capsule, Putamen.

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Thalamus
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Cerebellum
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: UC Davis — Central gyri (motor cortex)
regionProtocols.description: From UC Davis ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 29, 2022). Survey stains: H&E. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

notes: P62 / CD68 / other survey stains may not have Pitt schema stain types — see region descriptions.
Antibody fields that only say phospho/non-phospho are resolved from vendor/clone columns.
Regions marked Not Collected in the survey are omitted.
